# Canon Althea Greystone

## Material Reality

Althea eats common canal-heartland fare in clerical-minimum portions per EVERYDAY_LIFE §(a); she takes her midday meal at charter-court tavernary rooms when on Brinewick circuit, and in the seminary-refectory when home. She drinks boiled-water for teas and small ale only at charter-court dinners she cannot refuse (seminary austerity is a personal rule, not an order-rule).

Her seminary residence is a simple cell + study in the third-courtyard block of a mid-sized canal-heartland charter-town seminary (EVERYDAY_LIFE §(a) civic-core working-household density modulated for seminary housing). Her Brinewick lodging is a seminary-affiliated boarding house in the Sixth Bend with four other reform-current clergy on similar rotation. She owns no house and holds no standing rental.

Body: human baseline at vigorous-late-middle (PEOPLES §Humans); the early-sign-of-chronic-condition her physician named last winter is respiratory (winter-fever-adjacent; she has spent too many winters in campaign-travel outdoors in canal-air). She wears charter-cloth clergy-cloak and undecorated silver-clasp (common-pantheon reform-current register; her wing rejects ornament on political grounds). Her hair is gray-threading-white and cropped short. She has one scar on her right hand from a charter-court door-handle accident eight years ago; she uses it as her personal witness-mark when signing briefs.

Possessions: lap-desk with charter-court brief-portfolio; correspondence-bundle bound in reform-current seminary clasp; a small cross-reference of CF canon-law she has annotated; a plain broadsheet cutting she keeps for a case she lost eight years ago; a brass ink-well; a sermon-book of her mentor's (her mentor died ten years ago); her brother's carved canal-barge-handler's whistle he gave her at her ordination (she does not carry it on charter-court days but it is on her seminary desk).

She cannot lawfully reveal sealed-docket informant identities (CF-0036 procedure discipline + SOC-3 covenant); she cannot hold secular property beyond seminary-honorarium (her order's interior custom); she cannot easily decline a charter-court case her wing has committed to without wing-internal censure; she cannot personally visit a non-adopting highland clan-territory without clan-elder sanction (CF-0033 highland-non-adopting discipline).

Her mobility is canal-heartland circuit by barge + foot + occasional hired-carriage for emergency charter-court travel. She moves between her seminary (home base), Brinewick (weeks per month), three other adopting-polities on rotation, and occasional seminary-affiliated monastic-clinics.

She owes nothing standing; seminary-honorarium and civic-honorarium cover her needs; her personal reserve is negligible.

Her human-baseline embodiment (PEOPLES §Humans): no species-specific perceptual advantage; vigorous-late-middle body; human respiratory vulnerability to winter fever (her chronic condition); mobility by ordinary walking + barge + hired-carriage; hand-dexterity sufficient for charter-brief writing (she writes her own briefs in trade-tongue; no scrivener-dependence).

## Institutional Embedding

**Family / clan / household:** unmarried by seminary-vow convention (her wing permits partnership; she has not taken one); no children; brother in origin-town (Kell, canal-barge-handler, 48, married, two children); sister in origin-town (Mora, dry-goods merchant's wife, 45, widowed, one daughter); correspondent-network of four-to-six reform-current clergy across four heartland charter-towns (she exchanges letters weekly).

**Law / custom / judgment:** chartered-clergy civic standing across four heartland polities including Brinewick; charter-court bar-admission at senior-advocate rank; witness-capacity at magistrate-court across multi-polity register. She has appeared at 11 charter-court cases (7 won, 3 settled, 1 lost — the one broadsheet-cutting case). She honors SOC-3 covenant with her sealed-docket informants absolutely — she has twice used CF-0036 procedure to protect them.

**Religion / ritual:** canon-rank common-pantheon reform-current senior; CF-0026 charter-defense-anti-supremacism wing leadership-adjacent (she is not the wing-lead; she is second-tier senior advocate with her own case-docket); CF-0016 common-pantheon observance; she has declined sectarian-progenitor-supremacist correspondence twice and reported the second to her wing.

**Employer / guild:** seminary-order (not chartered-guild; order-institutional); civic-honorarium on charter-court cases through magistrate-court retainer; no other employment.

**Military / defense:** none; her physical safety on circuit is charter-court protection + seminary-escort convention for Brinewick travel.

**Debt:** none standing; seminary-honorarium covers; she has no personal coin-debt.

**Local taboo:** respects CAU-3 ward-specifics absolutely (her campaign targets institutional access, not inscription-content); respects CF-0036 sealed-docket procedural discipline (has used it twice; knows its cost); rejects supremacist-doctrine register absolutely; respects CF-0042 diffuse-rumor register discipline (she has cited CF-0042 state-security-concealment diffuse patterns without specific-named-incident per M-2 firewall).

**Literacy:** trade-tongue elite-literate; canon-law formal; charter-court brief-form fluent; DIS-2 upper-clerical. She writes her own briefs.

**Inheritance:** seminary-return of her lap-desk and correspondence-portfolio; her brother's whistle would return to her brother or his children; her mentor's sermon-book to the reform-current wing's next-generation successor (designated informally).

**Landholding:** none.

**Healing:** seminary-retained physician named her chronic-condition risk last winter; civic-clinic for acute; seminary-infirmary for convalescence.

**Burial:** seminary-cemetery clergy section in her origin-polity.

**Recordkeeping:** her case-book (11 cases detailed at charter-court-record depth); her sermon-archive (40+ composed sermons catalogued); her correspondence-archive (seminary-maintained).

## Epistemic Position

**Known firsthand:** 25 years of reform-current platform work; 11 charter-court cases (detailed legal-record depth); CF-0026 doctrinal lineage (her mentor's lineage back three generations); CF-0031 adoption-debate negotiations interior (she has been at the internal-coalition table for eight years); CF-0033 mission-creep docket pending (she is advocate-of-record); CF-0043 campaign interior (she has organized the eleventh-target campaign); the Ash-Seal defector's testimony (uncorroborated but detailed); CF-0036 sealed-docket procedural depth — she has used twice, both to protect informants; her mother's death of winter-fever 20 winters ago (the origin-event for her reform-current alignment); her brother's canal-barge-handler life (she visits quarterly); her sister's widowhood four winters ago.

**Known by rumor:** CF-0042 diffuse state-security-concealment register (held at circuit-rumor-level only; never specific-named); dowager-gossip circuit snippets from Brinewick estates (through her correspondence with Dowager Orreline Havenleigh / NCP-0004); CF-0028 expedition-politics heartland case-law (through wing-correspondent who does expedition-work); highland clan-correspondent politics (a clan-elder adjacent to but distinct from NCP-0003 has declined her latest charter-amicus request); Cluster D physician charter-standing question (through correspondence with Atreia Selviss / NCP-0005).

**Cannot know:** M-1 / M-2 / M-5 / M-6 / M-8 / M-9 / M-20 deep Maker-mystery territory; CAU-3 ward-specifics; CF-0021 / CF-0023 crafter-material interior (she campaigns around these without claiming specialist knowledge); Ash-Seal trade-secret archive contents (she advocates audit-access to without claiming access); specific facility-locations; the sealed-docket informants' post-procedure lives (she respects the seal).

**Wrongly believes:** M-1 folk reading at circuit-layer (PERMITTED); M-4 aspectualization reform-current reading (PERMITTED — progenitor-figures as aspects of the common-pantheon rather than historical or mythical entities); no forbidden leakages.

**Vocabulary she has:** trade-tongue elite + canon-law formal + charter-court brief-form + CF canon-reference fluent + coalition-political negotiation register + AES-1 laborer cross-register (she learned it from her brother's canal-barge-handler community); her formal sermon-cadence is a composed discipline.

**Vocabulary she lacks:** ward-inscription guild-internal (CAU-3); crafter vessel-preparation (CF-0021); Maker-linguistic (CF-0023); Ash-Seal internal trade-jargon at technician-depth; dowager-gossip interior-register (she reads the register but does not perform); clan-saga highland register (she has one correspondent-register at corresponding distance); drylands verse-register (her wing has no drylands correspondent); fenland marker-reed (she has read CF-0024 fenland-variant documentation without living it); combat register.

## Goals and Pressures

**Short-term goal:** decide the Ash-Seal defector's testimony — name the councilor in charter-court, or seal-docket the protection.

**Long-term desire:** consolidate the multi-axis reform platform into durable civic-procedure before the seminary succession-turn (two years out).

**Unavoidable obligation:** clergy vow (seminary-vow convention); charter-court bar (SOC-3 covenant with each case); reform-current internal-coalition (her CH-0010 charter-defense wing negotiations with the CH-0005 welfare-advocacy wing); correspondence-network reciprocity (four reform-current clergy expect her weekly).

**External pressure:** defector situation (the most acute); three-generation-mark abolition vs welfare-mandatory internal split (the most political); dragoon mission-creep Brinewick docket (the most dangerous); seminary succession (the most long-horizon); her chronic-condition diagnosis (the most personal-unaddressed).

**Public mask:** charter-court formal authority; reform-current pastoral register; seminary-austere personal presentation.

**Private appetite:** the single charter-audit-access language draft that outlasts her and becomes durable civic-procedure; to partner — which she has not permitted herself in 25 years and has begun to privately notice.

**Social fear:** platform-inconsistency exposed in charter-court; her sealed-docket use cited against her.

**Private shame:** a principled-refuser contractor she denied ward-specifics-waiver for eight years ago; the contractor died of the wound her refusal arguably compounded (she holds this privately; it is the broadsheet-cutting case). She has visited the contractor's widow twice and could not speak the full truth either time.

**Central contradiction:** transparency platform vs seal-docket-used. The Ash-Seal defector case compresses it: naming the councilor (platform-consistent transparency) exposes the defector and costs the access-channel for future informants; seal-docket-protecting the defector (informant-consistent practice) violates the platform she has advertised for eight years.

**Repeated forced choice:** belief-vs-observed-reality (she advocates the platform; her practice has compromised it); duty-vs-appetite (the case vs her chronic-condition prognosis); loyalty-vs-evidence (her wing's coalition vs what the defector's testimony suggests).

## Capabilities

### Chartered-clergy canon-authority (common-pantheon reform-current)

- **how_learned:** seminary ordination 25 years ago; reform-current specialization early; 25-year accrued bench-experience
- **cost_to_acquire:** vow-convention (material austerity); 25-year seminary commitment; the continuous campaign-travel that has accrued her chronic-condition risk
- **teachers_institutions:** seminary-order; her mentor (dead 10 years); reform-current wing-lineage
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for senior-canon rank; her depth-of-specialization at charter-court intersection is unusual-end stabilized by her 11-case record
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral; canal-heartland climate shapes her chronic risk

### Charter-court advocacy

- **how_learned:** charter-court bar-admission at year 5; 11-case record across 20 years; wing-mentorship in first five cases
- **cost_to_acquire:** legal preparation time; the weight of each case; the broadsheet-cutting case loss
- **teachers_institutions:** charter-court bar; seminary-legal training; wing-mentorship
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for senior reform-current canon rank
- **body_class_place_shape:** human-baseline; charter-court procedural geography

### Reform-current coalition-political negotiation

- **how_learned:** 15 years wing-internal-coalition work; 8 years at CF-0026 bifurcation-coalition table
- **cost_to_acquire:** relational capital across four wing-correspondent clergy; the continuous diplomacy
- **teachers_institutions:** wing-coalition itself
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for mid-to-senior
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral

### Sermon-craft and pastoral register

- **how_learned:** seminary-trained 25 years; 40+ composed sermons
- **cost_to_acquire:** compositional time
- **teachers_institutions:** seminary; her mentor
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for chartered-clergy
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral; her sermon-cadence is her personal compositional register

### Correspondence-network maintenance across four polities

- **how_learned:** accrued through 20 years wing-work
- **cost_to_acquire:** continuous writing time (weekly-to-daily cadence)
- **teachers_institutions:** reform-current wing-correspondence convention
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for circuit-reform-senior
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral

### AES-1 cross-register fluency (contractor register)

- **how_learned:** her brother's canal-barge-handler community mentorship in her twenties + CF-0026 principled-refuser field-work during wing-formation
- **cost_to_acquire:** ongoing cross-register-discipline practice; the social-distance her formal register creates otherwise
- **teachers_institutions:** her brother Kell (canal-barge-handler); CF-0026 principled-refuser field-contact
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for reform-current field clergy; her fluency is mid-upper for her wing
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral; canal-heartland working-context

## Voice and Perception

**Preferred metaphors:** charter-register formal (clause, precedent, standing, brief, motion, amicus); common-pantheon reform-current aspectual (the aspect, the turning, the office not the person); AES-1 laborer cross-register with contractors (coin, scar, rotation, vouch). She does not reach for clan-saga, verse, dowager-gossip, combat, or dramatic-inflation registers — she does not inflate her own register. She is deliberately spare in metaphor; her wing's register rejects ornament.

**Rhythm of speech:** formal compound-sentence in charter-court; warmer-shorter in pastoral visit; tired at end-of-circuit; measured when among wing-correspondents; careful with her brother's wife (her brother reads her formal register as distancing and she adjusts).

**Taboo words:** specific-named-incident (M-2 diffuse rumor discipline); the broadsheet-cutting case's specific details (the principled-refuser contractor's name); the names of her two sealed-docket informants; supremacist-doctrine register; "the Makers wanted" (any M-1 cause-of-fall hypothesis she holds to folk-layer discipline); any inflation of her own role.

**What she notices first:** charter-cloth weight and cut (clergy rank-signaling); the charter-court clerk's procedural cues (which case is coming before hers, which magistrate is presiding); a reform-current correspondent's deviation-from-register (a wing-correspondent's letter that departs from their usual cadence is her immediate diagnostic); a contractor's hands before their words (her brother's community taught her this).

**What she overlooks:** her own chronic cough onset; her siblings' concerns for her workload; her body's slowness; the way her formal register has distanced her from her origin-town relations.

**Species perception effects:** human baseline — no species-specific advantage; her perceptual edge comes from 25 years of institutional-volume pattern-reading.

## Contradictions and Tensions

Transparency-platform meets seal-docket-use; the defector situation is the external form of the internal question; her chronic-condition diagnosis is the clock she is not facing; her wing-coalition requires her continued full capacity; her personal life has been subordinate to the platform for 25 years and she has begun privately to notice.

## Likely Story Hooks

- **The Ash-Seal defector testimony decision arrives** (direct hook to NCP-0001). She must decide: name the councilor in charter-court and expose the defector, or seal-docket the defector and compromise the platform.
- **Dowager Orreline Havenleigh (NCP-0004) invites her to a drawing-room charter-audit conversation.** The Mellivers-new-stamp coincidence sits between them. Orreline's dowager-gossip circuit record is the witness-testimony Althea's campaign would cite; Orreline's willingness is the calendar-question.
- **A highland correspondent forwards clan-fragment-news** (link to NCP-0003). A clan-elder adjacent to but distinct from Ygrove has declined her charter-amicus request. The wing's cross-polity reach is constrained in ways she did not anticipate.
- **Atreia Selviss (NCP-0005) writes a second letter** about Cluster D physician charter-standing. A summer-pass visit is proposed. Althea's chronic-condition would constrain the travel.
- **The three-generation-mark abolition vs welfare-mandatory internal split forces her to publicly commit.** The abolition-wing lead holds an internal-coalition vote at winter-season's seminary convention. She must take her wing's position public.
- **Her physician names the chronic-condition formally** with an estimated-horizon. She must decide whether to continue the circuit-pace her campaign requires or step back to seminary-residence. Her wing has not been told.
